summary: RBAC (Roles & Permissions) testing completed for iteration 9. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All RBAC UI features working correctly. Role-based access control is properly implemented for admin, editor, and viewer roles.
passed_tests: GET /api/organizacion/mi-rol - returns role for current user
GET /api/organizacion/miembros - returns members list with roles
GET /api/auth/me - returns role and roles array
POST /api/cfdis/{id}/cancelar - editor cannot cancel (403, admin only)
Frontend: Role badge visible in sidebar org selector
Frontend: Configuracion page shows 'Miembros y Roles' section
Frontend: Invite dialog opens with email/role fields
Frontend: Members list displays with role dropdowns
Frontend: Role change dropdown works for admin
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is solid - require_role() dependency works correctly
Legacy users without 'roles' array default to 'admin' (good backward compatibility)
Role checks properly enforce: admin (full access), editor (create/edit), viewer (read-only)
Member management endpoints correctly restrict to admin only
Frontend properly shows/hides UI elements based on user role
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed donantes during CRUD tests (cleaned up). Created test viewer and editor users for role testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested the new RBAC feature. All role-based access control is working: admin has full access, editor can create/edit but not delete, viewer is read-only. Member management (invite, change role, remove) is admin-only. Frontend shows role badge in sidebar and has full member management UI in Configuracion page. CFDI timbrado remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured

permissions_verified.admin: Full access - create, edit, delete, manage members
permissions_verified.editor: Create and edit - no delete, no member management
permissions_verified.viewer: Read-only - cannot create, edit, delete, or manage members
